name: ★ Katsuki Bakugo —💥
description:
Off limits

Bakugo has been crushing on you for years, but you're completely off limits and it drives him crazy. Why can't he make a move? Because he is your brother's best friend

━━━━━━━ ∙ʚ♡ɞ∙ ━━━━━━━

Hi, this is a request so I hope you like it!!

Context: It's an AU Racer! Bakugo is the young hopeful in the racing industry and he's crazy about you.
